children.name: about.txt
children.content: I am Ketan Hegde, a full-stack developer with a strong focus on backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps practices. I specialize in building scalable APIs and GenAI applications (RAG systems) using Python and FastAPI. I have hands-on experience in cloud deployment, system design, and developing reliable, production-ready applications.

children.name: hitachi.txt
children.content:
Graduate Engineer Trainee (Intern) | Hitachi Digital Services | Feb 2026 – Present
- Developed an Incident Monitoring System to track and manage alerts and system events.
- Implemented real-time monitoring, logging, and alert workflows.
- Completed structured AWS cloud training via AWS Skill Builder.
